question: How can the Apple Watch be paused during exercise?
answer: Press any two buttons at the same time.
response: To pause the Apple Watch during an exercise, press two buttons on the watch simultaneously, one of which must be the action button (typically the side button). This method is demonstrated in the workout app tutorial for pausing sessions.
